projects.title: Projects
projects.emptyDescription: Create your first project to get started

projects.noResultsSearch: No projects found for that criteria
projects.deleteConfirmDescription: This action may deactivate it, not permanently delete it.

settingsTab.generalSubtitle: Update the project name and description.
settingsTab.currenciesSubtitle: Manage currencies for tracking equivalences in this project.
settingsTab.partnersSubtitle: Assign partners and control expense and income distribution.
settingsTab.removePartnerDescription: Their accounts will no longer be available for new expenses and income in this project.
settingsTab.paymentMethodsSubtitle: Link partner payment methods to use in expenses and income.
settingsTab.noLinkedPaymentMethodsDescription: Link payment methods to use them in project expenses and income.
settingsTab.noLinkedPaymentMethodsViewer: No payment methods linked to this project.
settingsTab.addPMDialogDescription: Partner payment methods assigned to the project that are not yet linked.
settingsTab.noAvailableToLink: No payment methods available to link.
settingsTab.removePaymentMethodDescription: The payment method will no longer be available in this project for new expenses and income.

members.removeConfirmDescription: The user will lose access to the project.
